title: Introducing People 介绍朋友认识
scene: 把两个不认识的朋友互相介绍。

lines.en: Hi Bob! I am so happy to see you here. There is someone I want you to meet.
lines.zh: 嗨Bob！很高兴在这里见到你。有个人我想介绍给你认识。

lines.en: Bob, this is Cindy. She is my classmate. Cindy, this is Bob. We are in the same art club.
lines.zh: Bob，这是Cindy。她是我的同学。Cindy，这是Bob。我们在同一个美术社团。

lines.en: Hi Cindy! Nice to meet you. Alice has told me a lot about you.
lines.zh: 嗨Cindy！很高兴认识你。Alice跟我说了很多关于你的事。

lines.en: Nice to meet you too, Bob! Alice says you are really good at drawing.
lines.zh: 我也很高兴认识你，Bob！Alice说你画画特别好。

lines.en: I like drawing, but Cindy, I heard you play the piano very well.
lines.zh: 我喜欢画画，不过Cindy，我听说你钢琴弹得很好。

lines.en: I have been playing for five years. Do you play any instruments, Bob?
lines.zh: 我学了五年了。Bob，你会演奏什么乐器吗？

lines.en: I play the guitar a little bit. Maybe we can perform together sometime!
lines.zh: 我会弹一点吉他。也许以后我们可以一起表演！

lines.en: That would be amazing! You two have a lot in common. Let us sit down and chat.
lines.zh: 那太棒了！你们俩有很多共同点。我们坐下来聊聊吧。

lines.en: Sounds great! I am sure we will be good friends.
lines.zh: 听起来不错！我相信我们会成为好朋友的。
